creator: hans@nordhaug.priv.no
text:
* Beech Rintoul <beech@FreeBSD.org> [2012-06-07]:
> Why don't we do:
> 
> post-patch:
>         @cd $(WRKSRC)/misc/log-analytics && $(RM) -rf import_logs.py.orig
> 
> So we don't leave files. If you approve I'll add it to the Makefile.

I approve, but it's an ugly/sub-optimal solution. patch-files are
detected automatically - orig-files should be deleted automatically.

Hans
